name: create_record
description: Create one or more new records in a specified Airtable table. You can create up to 10 records per request by passing an array. Each record contains a fields object mapping field names to their values. Supports all field types including text, numbers, attachments, and linked records.

parameters.name: baseId
parameters.description: The ID of the base containing the table (starts with 'app').

parameters.name: tableIdOrName
parameters.description: The ID or URL-encoded name of the table to create records in.

parameters.name: records
parameters.description: Array of record objects, each with a 'fields' property. Maximum 10 records per request.

parameters.name: typecast
parameters.description: If true, Airtable will try to convert string values to the appropriate cell type (e.g., turning a string into a date).
